evals.name: Quick-start findability
evals.question: Can an agent find the correct install command within the first 100 lines?
evals.fail_criterion: Agent must scroll past line 100 to find basic install
evals.notes: Install is at line 65 in baseline; preserved at ~same position in improved version

evals.name: No duplicate content
evals.question: Is every instruction block unique (no copy-paste duplicates)?
evals.pass_criterion: No repeated code blocks or instruction paragraphs
evals.notes: Removed duplicate 'Interactive wizard' block (lines 238-240 in baseline were exact copy of 217-219)

evals.name: Consistent section numbering
evals.question: Are sections/patterns numbered sequentially without gaps or reordering?
evals.fail_criterion: Any gap, skip, or out-of-order number
evals.notes: Baseline had sections 1-5 then jumped to 7-12 without 6, and workflow patterns were unnumbered subsection of section 6. Restructured to sections 1-11 sequential.

evals.name: Platform setup clarity
evals.question: For each platform, is there exactly one recommended setup path?
evals.pass_criterion: Each platform has a clear 'recommended' path marked
evals.fail_criterion: Multiple equivalent options without clear recommendation
evals.notes: Added bold (Recommended) label to: Claude Code→skill, Codex→TOML config, Gemini→CLI registration, OpenCode→JSON config. Also merged redundant 'Universal (npx add-mcp)' standalone section into Section 2.

evals.name: Watch-loop pattern completeness
evals.question: Does the watch-loop pattern include all 4 steps (watch→ack→fix→resolve)?
evals.fail_criterion: Any step missing or out of order
evals.notes: Pattern 2 preserved intact with all 4 steps

evals.name: Skill length reasonable
evals.question: Is the skill under 600 lines?
evals.notes: Reduced from 789 to 537 lines (32% reduction). Removed: inline 70-line setup-agentation-mcp.sh script (moved to file reference), jeo section condensed from ~100 to ~40 lines, removed redundant Universal npx add-mcp standalone section

experiments.mutation: Trim jeo section + remove inline setup script + remove redundant Universal section
